description: Pre-declared descriptors for model forms. Source-locked only. Used to enforce predeclaration before any target scoring.

descriptors.name: Mean Ca coordination number
descriptors.extraction: From CIF: average coordination of Ca sites using standard Voronoi or distance cutoff (document cutoff)
descriptors.source_requirement: Primary CIF from COD or equivalent with structure quality flags
descriptors.notes: Core structural gate for Ca-bearing silicates. Must be predeclared with exact extraction algorithm before use in any predictor.

descriptors.name: Mean Ca–O distance
descriptors.extraction: Average of all Ca–O bond lengths in the coordination polyhedra
descriptors.notes: Paired with coordination. Thresholds (e.g. ≥2.53 Å) must be justified from source data before model form freeze.

descriptors.name: T-site polarizability proxy
descriptors.extraction: Cation field strength delta × charge balance factor for T-site occupants (Al, Si, etc.)
descriptors.source_requirement: CIF + standard ionic radii table (cite source)
descriptors.notes: Replaces ad-hoc Al/O terms. Must be versioned with the radii table used.

descriptors.name: Silicate unit connectivity class
descriptors.extraction: Topology classification from CIF (Q^n species or ring/chain classification)
descriptors.notes: Key for distinguishing melilite vs. non-melilite Ca3Si2O7 polymorphs.

descriptors.name: Heavy H2X2 trans-planar topology penalty
descriptors.extraction: For heavy-atom H2X2 rotors only: coefficient × clamp01((torsionMean - 150) / 30)^2 × antiPlanarRelease × heavyAtomFactor(central element). Allowed central elements and coefficient must be frozen before fresh-target lookup.
descriptors.source_requirement: Geometry and charge rules must be source-locked before lookup; descriptor may be calibrated only on already-exposed failed H-S-S-H / H-Se-Se-H trans-side rows before a fresh target is reserved.
descriptors.notes: Diagnostic repair candidate for the exposed trans-side topology failure. Does not count as validation until an unchanged post-redesign formula passes a fresh held-out rotor target.

descriptors.name: Measured or calculated density
descriptors.extraction: Measured value preferred; calculated only when measured unavailable with full provenance
descriptors.source_requirement: Primary literature or database with citation and temperature
descriptors.notes: Always labelled as conventional control evidence. Never promoted as substrate-specific support.

descriptors.name: Lorentz-Lorenz molar refraction term
descriptors.notes: Primary conventional optical comparator. All substrate-inspired terms must be shown to add value over this baseline on held-out targets.

rules.predeclaration: Any new model form or predictor must declare the exact subset of descriptors from this registry (or an extension PR) before scoring any target.
rules.conventional_labelling: All entries with 'conventional': true must be reported as control comparators and never counted toward unification or substrate evidence.
rules.source_lock: No descriptor may be used in a scored prediction unless a primary source (CIF + optical + density) for the target has been pre-reserved and classified under these descriptors.
